div.head:
No. 242
Editorial Note
div.p: On July 27, the Senate Committee on Foreign Relations met with Secretary of State Dulles in executive session; the two plane incidents were discussed briefly. For a record of the discussion, see Executive Sessions of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee (Historical Series), volume VI, Eighty-third Congress, Second Session, 1954 (Washington, Government Printing Office, 1977), pages 690–692 and 697–702.
